item.title: Cline CLI v0.0.2-cli
item.description: ## Installation Install Cline CLI with a single command: ### Platform-Specific Downloads - **macOS (Intel)**: cline-v0.0.2-cli-darwin-x64.tar.gz - **macOS (Apple Silicon)**: cline-v0.0.2-cli-darwin-arm64.tar.gz - **Linux (x64)**: cline-v0.0.2-cli-linux-x64.tar.gz ### Manual Installation 1. Download the appropriate package for your platform 2. Extract: tar -xzf cline-*.tar.gz 3. Move to installation directory: mv cline-* ~/.cline 4. Add to PATH: export PATH="$HOME/.cline/bin:$PATH" ### What's Included - ✅ Node.js v22.15.0 (bundled) - ✅ Cline CLI binary - ✅ Cline Host bridge - ✅ Cline Core (TypeScript compiled) - ✅ Ripgrep v14.1.1 (for file searching) - ✅ All dependencies ### Getting Started ### Documentation - Installation Guide - CLI Documentation - GitHub Repository ## What's Changed * fixing terminalapp rendering of input forms by @pashpashpash in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6807 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v0.0.1-cli...v0.0.2-cli

item.title: v3.32.7
item.description: ## What's Changed * Log env vars in cline-core by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6595 * feat(focus-chain): Render checklist items as markdown by @NightTrek in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6452 * Update scripts/runclinecore.sh to include platform specific node module path by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6618 * Remove duplicate statemanager in migration by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6614 * Added checkpoints warning for multiroot scenarios by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6615 * Update local models docs & remove emojis from Docs by @nickbaumann98 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6624 * cli <--> main sync by @pashpashpash in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6576 * feat: feature flag for cline auth provider by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6629 * Make statemanager global singleton by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6619 * Bug Fix: replace featureFlagsService with isMultiRootEnabled utility by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6631 * Make the results of the GH test workflow easier to understand & fix windows tests by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6628 * cline cli super alpha by @pashpashpash in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6644 * add logout reason tracking and improve cleanup handling by @tseglevskiy in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6657 * adding send as a top level command by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6661 * Add watch build script by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6655 * refactor: Support Multiple Telemetry providers by @NightTrek in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6582 * Multiroot mentions support by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6627 * Provider scripts by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6668 * adding checkpoint restore to cli by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6669 * removing the duplicate error print by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6670 * implemented GetHostVersionResponse rpc in the cli by @pashpashpash in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6663 * remove global --config flag for cli by @Garoth in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6673 * feat: Adding Oca mode for internal and external by @nihar-oracle in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6599 * Auth refactor by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6674 * Add Bedrock global and jp inference profile support. by @ajjuaire in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6666 * feat(logging): replace HostProvider with node-machine-id for machine identification by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6680 * add settings flag and settings parsing by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6682 * add yolo flag by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6690 * fixed ispartial handling for all cases, and cleaned up output to not … by @pashpashpash in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6691 * add oneshot command by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6695 * Add zod schema for the remote config settings by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6675 * Add warning message to remote config schema file by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6701 * Add multiroot docs by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6597 * Remove fake setting Supports Browser Use by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6700 * Move MCP marketplace catalog from global state to disk cache by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/5835 * refactor: use different secret keys for each auth provider by @BarreiroT in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6630 * do_nothing feature flag by @tseglevskiy in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6712 * cli - markdown streaming ux by @pashpashpash in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6703 * now showing historical messages for cline task view by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6711 * Changeset version bump by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6616 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.32.6...v3.32.7

item.title: Cline CLI v3.32.6
item.description: ## Installation Install Cline CLI with a single command: ### Platform-Specific Downloads - **macOS (Intel)**: cline-v3.32.6-darwin-x64.tar.gz - **macOS (Apple Silicon)**: cline-v3.32.6-darwin-arm64.tar.gz - **Linux (x64)**: cline-v3.32.6-linux-x64.tar.gz ### Manual Installation 1. Download the appropriate package for your platform 2. Extract: tar -xzf cline-*.tar.gz 3. Move to installation directory: mv cline-* ~/.cline 4. Add to PATH: export PATH="$HOME/.cline/bin:$PATH" ### What's Included - ✅ Node.js v22.15.0 (bundled) - ✅ Cline CLI binary - ✅ Cline Host bridge - ✅ Cline Core (TypeScript compiled) - ✅ All dependencies ### Getting Started ### Documentation - Installation Guide - CLI Documentation - GitHub Repository

item.description: ## What's Changed * Add /task deep link handler by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6513 * fix: command execution not sending output to webview and incorrectly showing 'Proceed while Running' when finished by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6522 * remove getCurrentMode function in favor of state manager by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6418 * Don't show VS Code LM provider on non-VSCode platforms by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6523 * [disk.ts] Replace uses of context.globalStorageUri with HostProvider.get().globalStorageFsPath by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6507 * Handle quotes and other special chars in the curl request by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6525 * Replace VSCode API with Host Provider by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6527 * ref: Move getGlobalStorageDir out of the HostProvider into disk.ts by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6530 * Replace VSCode API with the host bridge. by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6529 * Add Claude Sonnet 4.5 by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6544 * Changeset version bump by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6511 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.32.1...v3.32.2

item.title: v3.28.0
item.description: ## What's Changed - Synchronized Task History: Real-time task history synchronization across all Cline instances - Optimized GPT-5 Integration: Fine-tuned system prompts for improved performance with GPT-5 model family - Deep Planning Improvements: Optimized prompts for Windows/PowerShell environments and dependency exclusion - Streamlined UI Experience: ESC key navigation, cleaner approve/reject buttons, and improved editor panel focus - Smart Provider Search: Improved search functionality in API provider dropdown for faster model selection - Added per-provider thinking tokens configurability - Added Ollama custom prompt options - Enhanced SAP AI Core Provider: Orchestration mode support and improved model visibility - Added Dify.ai API Integration - SambaNova Updates: Added DeepSeek-V3.1 model - Better Gemini rate limit handling - OpenAI Reasoning Effort: Minimal reasoning effort configuration for OpenAI models - Fixed LiteLLM Caching: Anthropic caching compatibility when using LiteLLM - Fixed Ollama default endpoint connections - Fixed AutoApprove menu overflow - Fixed extended thinking token issue with Anthropic models - Fixed issue with slash commands removing text from prompt ## New Contributors * @ciekawy made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/5793 * @willhs made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/5852 * @JicLotus made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/5944 * @weichensw made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/5884 * @arman-sambanova made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6001 * @dnoggle made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6120 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.26.6...v3.28.0
